results.rendered_html: sa—psara mfn. (of doubtful meaning) either ‘doing injury’ (= hiṃsaka,  Sāy. ), or ‘having the same form’ (= samāna-rūpa cf. 2. psu, p. 715), or (accord. to others) ‘eating the same food’ (cf. psaras), or ‘inspiring awe’ (said of the Maruts),  RV. i, 68, 9.
